description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages validate, test, and deploy using the monachus/hugo image as the default and specific images for certain jobs. In the validate stage add a content_link_check job using the nwops/liche image that runs `/go/bin/liche -v content/**/*.md`, a grammar_check job using node:alpine that runs `npm -g add write-good` then `/usr/local/bin/write-good content/**/*.md`, a layout_link_check job also using nwops/liche that runs `/go/bin/liche -v layouts/**/*.html`, and a spell_check job using tmaier/markdown-spellcheck:latest that runs `mdspell --report "content/**/*.md" --ignore-acronyms --ignore-numbers --en-us`. In the test stage add a compile_test job that runs `hugo` and is excluded from the master branch, and a pages job that runs `hugo`, publishes the `public` and `resources` directories as artifacts expiring in 1 day, and runs only on the master branch. In the deploy stage add a production_deploy job that runs `hugo`, then `aws s3 cp ./public/ s3://$AWS_BUCKET/ --recursive`, then `aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $AWS_CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID --paths /index.html`, then `echo "Site available at $URL_ROOT"`, runs only on master, and is manual, using the variables AWS_BUCKET, AWS_CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID and URL_ROOT.
